title: Manual Route Selection and Spatial Agency
summary: Successfully integrated manual route selection and partial hazard visibility into the console traversal system.
strengths: Defined clear boundaries for manual route selection and route hazard visibility.
Integrated traversal stubs to calculate context-aware hazards and partial information.
Updated console command `traverse` (as alias for advance) to accept specific route IDs.
Console status and transcripts now capture and report 'Route Recon' based on partial visibility data.
Preserved core rules by ensuring no perfect information and no fully deterministic pathfinding.
weaknesses: Currently uses simple percentage-based visibility bands instead of deep contextual descriptions.
Ties heavily into the text console; UI representations will require adaptation.
opportunities: Future stages can layer 'Territorial Instability and Foothold Collapse' (STAGE-018) onto the explicit route selection to force players to abandon safe routes.
Can introduce new consumable items (e.g. 'Scouting Lanterns') that temporarily boost visibility accuracy.
next_stage: STAGE-018: Territorial Instability and Foothold Collapse
